title: When Distributional Findings Deceive: A Methodology for Dynamic Analysis of Clustered Software Panels, Demonstrated on the AI-Accessibility Question — Replication Package
description: Replication package for the merged manuscript: mean-effect DiD analysis (stage5_did.py, panel.csv), stochastic-dynamics analysis (dynamics_analysis.py over file-level diffs), and the four-rater construct-validation of the AST semantic score (validation/). repos.db (the full SQLite source database) is archived alongside this record. Code is MIT-licensed; data files (panel.csv and the derived data/ CSVs) are CC BY 4.0.
